title: SurfaceSites
description: Generic surface-site catalogue used by /moon and /mars (PRD-009 / RFC-012). Each entry is either a `kind: 'surface'` artefact (lander, rover, crashed-but-located vehicle — requires lat/lon) or a `kind: 'orbiter'` spacecraft (requires altitude_km + inclination_deg). The agency enum is the operating org; the nation enum is the country/continent of origin (Soviet missions are ROSCOSMOS-attributed for branding continuity but USSR-attributed for the historical narrative).

kind.description: surface = lander/rover/crashed (lat,lon required); orbiter = circling (altitude_km, inclination_deg required)

lon.description: Surface longitude (deg). Required for kind:surface. Mars convention: +E 0..360. Moon: +E -180..+180.

altitude_km.description: Representative orbital altitude (km). Required for kind:orbiter. Use periapsis for highly elliptical orbits.

eccentricity.description: Orbital eccentricity (dimensionless). Optional for kind:orbiter; defaults to 0 (circular).

surface_status.description: completed = mission ended; ongoing = still active; planned = not yet launched. For orbiters: completed = ended, ongoing = active.

mission_id.description: Cross-link to data/missions/{moon,mars}/[mission_id].json. When set, the panel surfaces a 'FULL MISSION CARD' chip linking to /missions?id=[mission_id].

fleet_refs.description: Cross-reference to /fleet entries (PRD-012 v0.2 / RFC-016 v0.2 OQ-16). Each ref names the fleet entry id + the role this hardware played at this site. Validated bidirectionally at build: every id must exist in fleet/index.json, and the named fleet entry's linked_sites must include this site.
